name: Sanatana Resources Inc.
summary: Sanatana Resources Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It primarily holds a 100% interest in the Tirua copper-gold project covering an area of 282 square kilometers located in the Solomon Islands; and Gold Rush project located in the Timmins Region of Ontario. The company was formerly known as Sanatana Diamonds Inc. and changed its name to Sanatana Resources Inc. in April 2011. Sanatana Resources Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
